Metadata.title: AI Agents for Clinics: automate patient intake and scheduling
Metadata.description: Automate your clinic's front desk in the Algarve. Use AI agents to respond, qualify leads, and book appointments 24/7. Get a free diagnostic.

Hero.bannerAlt: Healthcare professional at a clinic reception with digital interfaces — streamlining patient care with AI
Hero.h1: The phone never stops. Reception can't answer everything. And patients slip through the cracks.
Hero.lead: Automate patient intake and qualification with AI agents that respond with context, follow your rules, and hand control to your team when needed.
Hero.p1: Missed calls. Unanswered emails. WhatsApp messages piling up.
Hero.p2: While your team tries to respond to everything, they're constantly interrupted — and what should be patient focus turns into firefighting.
Hero.p3: At Flow Productions, we build AI agents that work like digital colleagues: they respond immediately, qualify requests, and organise information without losing context.
Hero.p4: All with control, defined rules, and human oversight.
Hero.p5: AI handles the repetition. Your team focuses on what really matters.

Body.bodyImageAlt: Illustration of AI-assisted diagnostics on a tablet — Clinix AI concept, deep purple background with medical data visualisation
Body.capabilitiesTitle: What these AI agents do in practice
Body.title: AI agents for clinics: when front-desk work stops being the bottleneck
Body.p1: The phone rings and someone has to drop what they're doing.
Body.p2: An email arrives asking for information, but the reply stays pending.
Body.p3: A WhatsApp message comes in, but lack of time means a delayed response.
Body.p4: This cycle repeats all day: it fragments your team's attention and creates gaps in service. That's where patients are lost.
Body.introBullets: At Flow Productions, we develop and deploy AI agents trained on your clinic's context.
Body.bullet2: Answer FAQs with the right context
Body.bullet4: Route contacts to your team with structured information
Body.capabilitiesImageAlt: AI clinical assistant illustration — professional figure in medical scrubs with M.D.I. unit badge, sticker-style cutout
Body.handover: Whenever needed, the conversation moves to a human with full history, the right context, and no friction.
Body.crm: Where applicable, the agent can integrate with your clinic CRM for data updates and appointment workflows, subject to API review and the technical constraints of your existing system.
Body.result: The outcome isn't just time saved — it's your clinic's ability to respond to everyone, with quality, every single day.

ValueStrip.title: Instant answers, your rules, your team in control
ValueStrip.subtitle: Presented clearly — so you can see the impact on intake and reception.
ValueStrip.b1: Fast responses on the channels your clinic already uses
ValueStrip.b2: Tone, boundaries, and escalation defined by you
ValueStrip.b3: History and context preserved when a human takes over
ValueStrip.b4: Ongoing tuning and support from our team

HowItWorks.title: How does it work?
HowItWorks.s1Body: We analyse your current intake and communication flows.
HowItWorks.s2Body: We design rules, tone of voice, and control boundaries.
HowItWorks.s3Body: The agent takes on the tasks, with ongoing monitoring by our team.

Closing.title: Want to see how this applies to your clinic?
Closing.line2: Just a clear diagnostic to pinpoint where AI can create real impact.
Closing.button: Find the right AI agents for my clinic
Closing.flowReference: You get an instant AI suggestion on this page. Afterward you can talk to Flowi, our agent on flowproductions.pt, in a new tab.

DiagnosticWizard.startIntro: Answer six short questions. Our assistant suggests the best-fit AI agent profile for your clinic.
DiagnosticWizard.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
DiagnosticWizard.errorConfig: AI recommendations are not configured on the server yet (missing GEMINI_API_KEY).
DiagnosticWizard.resultDisclaimer: Indicative guidance only — not a binding offer or medical advice. We confirm fit with you on a call.
DiagnosticWizard.q1_prompt: Where do most patients contact you first?
DiagnosticWizard.q2_prompt: Roughly how many inbound contacts does reception handle on a busy day?
DiagnosticWizard.q3_a: Missed calls or long wait times
DiagnosticWizard.q3_b: Slow replies on messaging or email
DiagnosticWizard.q3_d: Handover to CRM or the clinical team
DiagnosticWizard.q4_prompt: How would you describe your patient systems?
DiagnosticWizard.q4_a: Spreadsheets, paper, or no shared system
DiagnosticWizard.q4_c: CRM or PMS with APIs we can integrate
DiagnosticWizard.q5_prompt: Who usually covers front desk and triage?
DiagnosticWizard.q5_a: One or two people wearing many hats
DiagnosticWizard.q5_c: Reception plus admin or call-back staff
DiagnosticWizard.q5_d: It varies by shift or location
DiagnosticWizard.q6_prompt: What would success look like in the first 90 days?
DiagnosticWizard.q6_b: Faster first response on peak channels
DiagnosticWizard.q6_c: Consistent answers that follow our scripts
DiagnosticWizard.q6_d: Less manual workload for the team

JsonLd.orgDescription: Flow Productions: AI agents for clinics — intake, qualification, and CRM integration with human oversight and clinic-defined rules.
